gold_source: CIViC (Clinical Interpretation of Variants in Cancer) — public, peer-curated

metric_definition.canonical_biomarker_recall: Per paper: % of unique gold biomarkers (after gene-level normalization across BM_Details/BM_Results/Inferences) that appear anywhere in extraction. Pharma headline metric.
metric_definition.full_f1: Strict per-row, per-field F1 against CIViC gold. Bounded ~25-50% by design because CIViC encodes only drug-response evidence; extractor pulls every biomarker in the paper. Use for diagnostic comparison only.

versions.label: Phase-1 normaliser
changes: Verification agent ships with: protein↔gene aliases (HER2→ERBB2, etc.), 1-letter point mutation strip, 3-letter aa code strip, fusion target extraction, CIViC compound profile split on " AND "
First pass against CIViC gold for 10 showcase papers
versions.notes: Baseline before canonical-recall metric existed. F1-only scoring.

versions.label: Canonical metric + orphan removed
changes: Removed orphan PDF 26125448 (no CIViC evidence — was contaminating scores with 0%)
rescore_baseline.py now iterates manifest, not pdf glob
versions.notes: First time we measured canonical recall. Shows 4/9 papers already at 100%.

versions.label: Phase-2 normaliser fixes
changes: P-loop / kinase domain: ABL1 P-Loop Mutation → abl1
OR-split for compound profiles: KRAS G12 or KRAS G13 → kras
Bare aa-position: BRAF V600 → braf, KRAS G12/G13 → kras
BCR-ABL funnel: bcr-abl, BCR::ABL1 Fusion, Philadelphia chromosome all → abl1 (consistent kinase target rule)
versions.notes: Median canonical recall hits 100% for the first time. 7/9 papers at 100%.

versions.label: Re-extracts + bug fixes + HGVS notation
changes: Fixed p_value float→string coercion in BMResultsAgent (was crashing on numeric LLM output)
Bumped LLM max_retries to 8 for transient TPM rate-limits
HGVS range/indel: BRAF V600_K601>E, BRAF T599_V600insT, BRAF L597P/Q/R/S all → braf
versions.notes: All 10 papers extracted. 8/10 at 100% canonical recall. Remaining 2 gaps: 22802530 (structural CIViC encoding mismatch — paper measures PI3K, CIViC encodes as ERBB2) and 34247201 (extractor missed KEAP1, captured downstream NQO1 only).
